---
title: "nitrix.geometry.sphere"
generated: true
signature-hash: 754646b69c249c54
description: "2-sphere primitives."
listing:
  id: nitrix-geometry-sphere-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-geometry-sphere/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.geometry.sphere`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
2-sphere primitives.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:__module__ -->
### Coordinate conventions

We use *Cartesian* normal-vector format `(x, y, z)` as the
canonical representation: every coordinate on the sphere is a
unit 3-vector (or an `r`-scaled 3-vector for a radius-`r`
sphere).  This is the format consumed by
[`spherical_geodesic_distance`](nitrix-geometry-sphere/spherical_geodesic_distance.qmd), [`spherical_conv`](nitrix-geometry-sphere/spherical_conv.qmd), and the
icosphere generation utilities.

For lat/long inputs (e.g. data digitised from a globe), convert
once via [`latlong_to_cartesian`](nitrix-geometry-sphere/latlong_to_cartesian.qmd).  All downstream operations
assume the Cartesian representation.

[`spherical_conv`](nitrix-geometry-sphere/spherical_conv.qmd) re-backs the legacy all-pairs convolution on
`semiring_ell_matmul` over a k-nearest-neighbour
adjacency, reducing the per-call cost from $O(n^2)$ to
$O(n \cdot k)$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `2` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `3` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `n_vertices` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_faces` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n_source` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-geometry-sphere-symbols}
:::
